name: Bama
content: Bama, or the University of Alabama, is the size of a small city, and is home to a football team, sorority drama, and a lot of drunk teenagers. The thought of going on campus during the school year scares me. The people I have met and worked with who were students there are nice people. At any given point in time, roughly 1% of the population of Alabama is enrolled as a student at Bama.
